issue: 3 conflicting sources of truth: Nitro plugin hardcoded 'en', i18n defaultLocale: 'en', detectBrowserLanguage overwriting cookies
rootCause: detectBrowserLanguage fought custom locale cookie management. Short locale codes passed to GraphQL returned 0 results
resolution: Disabled detectBrowserLanguage, changed defaultLocale to 'sv', added ensureBcp47Locale, added SupportedLocale type
specFix: Hard-blocks added for locale rules. Architecture documented in docs/conventions/ssr.md

issue: ProductList.vue crashes with null object during SSR render, 500 errors on hard refresh
rootCause: Template and script access async data without null guards. SSR renders before async data resolves
resolution: Added null guards (optional chaining + nullish coalescing). Guarded window.scrollTo with import.meta.client
specFix: Added hard block + SSR convention doc section + instinct pattern (confidence 5)

issue: Reviewers and documenters never ran during implementation. 5 quality + 3 convention warnings shipped uncaught
rootCause: Orchestrator dispatched single planner to do everything instead of per-spec pipeline
resolution: Required second pass (7 more commits) to fix type casts, DRY violations, stale docs
specFix: NEVER dispatch planner to do everything. Orchestrate per-spec: implement → spec review → stage 2 audit → documenter

issue: as any / as Record<string, unknown> casts (6 occurrences) to access SDK fields
rootCause: SDK types lack fields that GraphQL fragments return. Planner used casts instead of extending types
resolution: Created DetailProduct and CampaignInfo in shared/types/commerce.ts. Removed all casts
specFix: When SDK types miss fields, extend in shared/types/commerce.ts. Never as any for known fields

issue: Identical computeds duplicated in CartDrawer + CartPage. Campaign filter duplicated in 5 components
rootCause: Planner implemented each component independently without cross-component DRY check
resolution: Extracted to cart store getters + filterVisibleCampaigns() utility
specFix: Before adding logic to a second component, check if it exists elsewhere. Extract to store/composable/utility

issue: 13 locale/market problems — multiple sources of truth, cache key bugs, race conditions, validation in wrong layer
rootCause: Locale parsing/validation/expansion spread across plugin 00, middleware, utils, composable with no validated result
resolution: Created ResolvedLocaleMarket as single source of truth. Moved validation into plugin 01. Server consumers read from event.context.resolvedLocaleMarket
specFix: Architecture documented in docs/conventions/ssr.md. Hard block added for resolvedLocaleMarket usage
